ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Change and switch between sources for map tiles. An optional dark mode URL can be defined for each source. If no such URL is defined and dark mode is used, the map colors are reverted. See the documentation for more details.
ast.target: 更改并切换地图瓦片的来源。可以为每个来源定义一个可选的暗色模式 URL。如果未定义此类 URL 且使用暗色模式，则地图颜色会反转。有关更多详细信息，请参阅文档。

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Open in a new tab and keep reusing it
ast.target: 在新标签页中打开并持续复用

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Open in a 2nd pane and keep reusing it
ast.target: 在第二个面板中打开并持续复用

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Open in same pane (replace Map View)
ast.target: 在同一面板中打开（替换地图视图）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 在最近使用的面板中打开

ast.name: alert
ast.source: This requires an open Map View.
ast.target: 这需要一个打开的地图视图。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This will delete all the tiles for the selected URL, are you sure?
ast.target: 这将删除所选URL的所有瓦片，您确定吗？

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无法更新内联地理位置：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Extra content at the end of the document

ast.name: error
ast.source: You can't cut polygons with self-intersections
ast.target: 无法切割具有自相交的多边形

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to create chart: can't acquire context from the given item
ast.target: 创建图表失败：无法从给定项获取上下文

ast.name: error
ast.source: Something went wrong building the map, it has

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot register Map View embeds: embed registry not found.
ast.target: 无法注册地图视图嵌入：未找到嵌入注册表。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error updating layers on file modification:
ast.target: 文件修改时更新图层错误：

ast.name: log
ast.target: 地图视图：无法创建文件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 谷歌链接：找到的地点名称 =

ast.name: log
ast.target: 未知的前置元数据位置格式：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Map View: Google Places search failed:
ast.target: 地图视图：谷歌地点搜索失败：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Map View: Google Places API error:
ast.target: 地图视图：谷歌地点API错误：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Map View: this device does not support live geolocation.
ast.target: 地图视图：此设备不支持实时地理位置。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 地图视图实时位置错误：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Map View will stop querying the real-time location for this session.
ast.target: 地图视图将停止为本次会话查询实时位置。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Map View: Real-time location is stale, removing from all maps
ast.target: 地图视图：实时位置已过期，正在从所有地图中移除

ast.name: log
ast.source: Map view: map refresh due to CSS change
ast.target: 地图视图：由于CSS更改，地图正在刷新

ast.name: log
ast.target: 跳过已关闭的地图容器：

ast.name: log
ast.target: 地图视图已初始化，包含

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Load map markers and paths cache in the background when Obsidian starts. This greatly speeds up Map View but takes memory even when unused. When off, the map content will load only when Map View is first used.
ast.target: 在Obsidian启动时，在后台加载地图标记和路径缓存。这大大加快了地图视图的速度，但即使未使用也会占用内存。关闭后，地图内容仅在首次使用地图视图时加载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Auto zoom & pan the map to fit search results, including Follow Active Note.
ast.target: 自动缩放和平移地图以适应搜索结果，包括“跟踪活动笔记”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep only one controls section expanded at a time, i.e. collapse the currently-expanded section when you click another one. (Restart Map View for this to take effect.)
ast.target: 一次只展开一个控制部分，即当您点击另一个部分时，折叠当前展开的部分。（重启地图视图以使此设置生效。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The service used for searching for geolocations. To use Google, see details in the plugin documentation.
ast.target: 用于搜索地理位置的服务。要使用谷歌，请参阅插件文档中的详细信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The OpenStreetMap Nominatim provider requires a user email. Restart Map View after setting it.
ast.target: OpenStreetMap Nominatim提供程序需要用户电子邮件。设置后请重启地图视图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If using Google as the geocoding search provider, paste the API key here. See the plugin documentation for more details. Changes are applied after restart.
ast.target: 如果使用谷歌作为地理编码搜索提供程序，请在此处粘贴API密钥。更多详情请参阅插件文档。更改将在重启后生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use Google Places API instead of Google Geocoding to get higher-quality results. Your API key must have a specific "Google Places (New)" permission turned on! See the plugin documentation for more details.
ast.target: 使用谷歌地点API代替谷歌地理编码以获得更高质量的结果。您的API密钥必须启用特定的“谷歌地点（新版）”权限！更多详情请参阅插件文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To use Places API templates (see the documentation -- i.e. "googleMapsPlaceData.place_id"), enlist here the fields you are interested to query, separated by commas, e.g. place_id,business_status.
ast.target: 要使用地点API模板（请参阅文档——即“googleMapsPlaceData.place_id”），请在此处列出您感兴趣的查询字段，用逗号分隔，例如place_id,business_status。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in ms to wait before searching while you type (required to not flood the search provider with every key). In the OSM search provider, a minimum of 1 second is required and enforced.
ast.target: 输入时等待搜索的延迟（毫秒）（需要此设置以避免向搜索提供程序发送过多请求）。在OSM搜索提供程序中，最少需要1秒并强制执行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Date/times in the format can be wrapped in {{date:...}}, e.g. "note-{{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}". Search queries can be added with {{query}}.
ast.target: 格式中的日期/时间可以用{{date:...}}包裹，例如“note-{{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}”。搜索查询可以用{{query}}添加。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disk path for notes created from the map.
ast.target: 从地图创建笔记的磁盘路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the file to use as a template, e.g. "templates/map-log.md".
ast.target: 选择要用作模板的文件，例如“templates/map-log.md”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximal radius in pixels to cover in a marker cluster. Higher values will group more markers together, which leads to better performance. (Requires restart.)
ast.target: 标记聚类中要覆盖的最大半径（像素）。更高的值会将更多标记分组在一起，从而提高性能。（需要重启。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When jumping to the map from a note, what should be the display zoom? This is also used as a max zoom for "Map follows search results" above.
ast.target: 从笔记跳转到地图时，显示缩放级别应为多少？这也用作上面“地图跟随搜索结果”的最大缩放级别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow zooming further than the maximum defined for the map source, interpolating the image of the highest available zoom.
ast.target: 允许缩放超过地图源定义的最大值，插值最高可用缩放级别的图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: While making changes to the map, save the history to be browsable through Obsidian back/forward buttons.
ast.target: 在修改地图时，保存历史记录以便通过Obsidian的前进/后退按钮浏览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What query to use for following active notes (in the main or mini view), $PATH$ being the file path.
ast.target: 用于跟踪活动笔记（在主视图或迷你视图中）的查询，$PATH$代表文件路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Monitor the clipboard and add a "locations:" front-matter if a supported geolocation is pasted from the keyboard.
ast.target: 监控剪贴板，如果从键盘粘贴了支持的地理位置，则添加“locations:”前置元数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The key Map View uses to denote a front matter geolocation. Restart required. Beware: changing this will make your old front matter key not recognized as geolocations by Map View.
ast.target: 地图视图用于表示前置元数据地理位置的键。需要重启。注意：更改此设置将使您的旧前置元数据键不再被地图视图识别为地理位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Instead or in addition to the "locations:" YAML tag, you can use a regular tag that will mark for Map View that a note has inline geolocations, e.g. "#hasLocations". (Note: this has a performance penalty for the time being.)
ast.target: 除了“locations:”YAML标签外，您还可以使用常规标签来标记笔记具有内联地理位置，例如“#hasLocations”。（注意：目前这会有性能损失。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How and if Map View handles geolinks in notes (both front matter and inline)
ast.target: 地图视图如何以及是否处理笔记中的地理链接（包括前置元数据和内联）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, Map View will handle geolinks internally, and turn front matter locations into links. (Requires restarting Obsidian to update correctly.)
ast.target: 开启后，地图视图将在内部处理地理链接，并将前置元数据位置转换为链接。（需要重启Obsidian才能正确更新。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a popup with a map preview when hovering on geolinks in notes. Requires "Geolinks in Notes" above.
ast.target: 当鼠标悬停在笔记中的地理链接上时，显示带有地图预览的弹出窗口。需要上面的“笔记中的地理链接”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Zoom level to use for the geolink map preview popup.
ast.target: 用于地理链接地图预览弹出窗口的缩放级别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the Obsidian context menu for geolinks in notes, making sure Map View "open in" items are shown correctly. Requires "Geolinks in Notes" above. Does not currently work in iOS.
ast.target: 覆盖笔记中地理链接的Obsidian上下文菜单，确保地图视图的“在...中打开”项目正确显示。需要上面的“笔记中的地理链接”。目前在iOS上不起作用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What is shown when hovering (desktop) or clicking (mobile) map markers.
ast.target: 鼠标悬停（桌面）或点击（移动）地图标记时显示的内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a popup with the note name when hovering on a map marker.
ast.target: 当鼠标悬停在地图标记上时，显示带有笔记名称的弹出窗口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In the popup above, show also the link name, in the case of an inline link.
ast.target: 在上面的弹出窗口中，如果是内联链接，还显示链接名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In addition to the note name, show a preview if the note contents. Either way, it will be displayed only if the map is large enough to contain it.
ast.target: 除了笔记名称外，如果地图足够大以容纳它，还会显示笔记内容的预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a hover popup summarizing the icons inside a marker cluster.
ast.target: 显示一个悬停弹出窗口，总结标记聚类内的图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control when and if Map View should use panes vs tabs, new panes vs existing ones etc.
ast.target: 控制地图视图何时以及是否应使用窗格与标签页、新窗格与现有窗格等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How should the corresponding note be opened following a click on a marker?
ast.target: 点击标记后应如何打开对应的笔记？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How should the corresponding note be opened following a Ctrl+click on a marker?
ast.target: Ctrl+点击标记后应如何打开对应的笔记？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How should the corresponding note be opened following a middle-click on a marker?
ast.target: 中键点击标记后应如何打开对应的笔记？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How should Map View open by default (e.g. when clicking the ribbon icon, or from within a note).
ast.target: 地图视图默认应如何打开（例如，当点击功能区图标或从笔记内部打开时）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How should Map View open when Ctrl is pressed.
ast.target: 按住Ctrl键时，地图视图应如何打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How should Map View open when using middle-click.
ast.target: 使用中键点击时，地图视图应如何打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which way should the pane be split when opening in a new pane.
ast.target: 在新窗格中打开时，窗格应如何分割。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 'Open in' actions showing in geolocation-relevant popup menus. URL should have {x} and {y} as parameters to transfer, and an optional {name} parameter can be used.
ast.target: 在地理位置相关的弹出菜单中显示的“在...中打开”操作。URL应包含{x}和{y}作为要传递的参数，还可以使用可选的{name}参数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customizable rules for converting URLs of various mapping services to coordinates, for the purpose of the "Convert URL" action.
ast.target: 用于将各种地图服务的URL转换为坐标的可自定义规则，用于“转换URL”操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display an embedded map for a 'geojson' code block.
ast.target: 为“geojson”代码块显示嵌入式地图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display an embedded map for embeds (e.g. `![[my path.gpx]]`) of supported path files.
ast.target: 为支持的路径文件的嵌入（例如`![[my path.gpx]]`）显示嵌入式地图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL to use for an external routing service, used for "route to point". {x0},{y0} are the source lat,lng and {x1},{y1} are the destination lat,lng.
ast.target: 用于外部路由服务的URL，用于“路由到点”。{x0},{y0}是源纬度、经度，{x1},{y1}是目的地纬度、经度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You may obtain a free or a paid key from GraphHopper to enable native routing in Map View.
ast.target: 您可以从GraphHopper获取免费或付费密钥，以在地图视图中启用原生路由。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A comma-delimited list of profiles to support. Note that the free plan supports only the default values listed here.
ast.target: 支持的配置文件的逗号分隔列表。请注意，免费计划仅支持此处列出的默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste here a JSON (wrapped in {...}) of valid GraphHopper parameters. See the GraphHopper routing POST documentation for more details.
ast.target: 在此处粘贴一个包含有效 GraphHopper 参数的 JSON（用 {...} 包裹）。更多详情请参阅 GraphHopper 路由 POST 文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save and delete tiles for offline usage. Also available via the context menu of the map.
ast.target: 保存并删除瓦片以供离线使用。也可通过地图的上下文菜单使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically store all viewed tiles to be available locally. Great for performance but takes some storage. When this is off, only tiles explicitly downloaded for offline storage are kept.
ast.target: 自动存储所有已查看的瓦片，使其在本地可用。对性能有益，但会占用一些存储空间。关闭此选项后，仅保留为离线存储明确下载的瓦片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove old tiles on Obsidian startup to keep your map up-to-date. This currently applies both to auto-cached and explicitly downloaded tiles.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 启动时移除旧瓦片，以保持地图更新。此操作目前同时适用于自动缓存和明确下载的瓦片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove tiles by age on Obsidian startup if the storage size is too high. This currently applies both to auto-cached and explicitly downloaded tiles.
ast.target: 如果存储空间过大，在 Obsidian 启动时按瓦片年龄移除。此操作目前同时适用于自动缓存和明确下载的瓦片。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When an empty front-matter location key is found in a note (either 'location' or a custom key set above), and real-time location is available, auto-fill the location. Can be used together with templates to auto-fill a daily location etc. Only available on mobile.
ast.target: 当在笔记中发现空的 front-matter 位置键（可以是 'location' 或上方设置的自定义键），并且实时位置可用时，自动填充位置。可与模板一起使用，以自动填充每日位置等。仅在移动设备上可用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: File with paths including this text will not auto-fill on an empty location property. Important so Map View will not ruin templates.
ast.target: 包含此文本的文件路径将不会在空位置属性上自动填充。这很重要，以免地图视图破坏模板。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Only one controls section expanded at a time
ast.target: 一次只展开一个控件部分

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 地理编码 API 密钥

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用 Google Places 进行搜索

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Google Places data fields to query
ast.target: 要查询的 Google Places 数据字段

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default zoom for "show on map" action
ast.target: “在地图上显示”操作的默认缩放级别

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Allow zooming beyond the defined maximum
ast.target: 允许缩放超过定义的最大值

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保存前进/后退历史记录

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Fix front-matter on inline geolocation paste
ast.target: 在内联地理位置粘贴时修复 front-matter

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Tag name to denote inline geolocations
ast.target: 用于表示内联地理位置的标签名称

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 处理笔记中的地理链接

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在笔记中显示地理链接预览

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Zoom of the geolink map preview
ast.target: 地理链接地图预览的缩放级别

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 笔记中的地理链接上下文菜单

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show note name on marker hover
ast.target: 标记悬停时显示笔记名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show inline link name on marker hover
ast.target: 标记悬停时显示内联链接名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show note preview on marker hover
ast.target: 标记悬停时显示笔记预览

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show native Obsidian popup on marker hover
ast.target: 标记悬停时显示 Obsidian 原生弹出窗口

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default action for map marker click
ast.target: 地图标记点击的默认操作

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default action for map marker Ctrl+click
ast.target: 地图标记 Ctrl+点击的默认操作

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default action for map marker middle-click
ast.target: 地图标记中键点击的默认操作

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Default mode for opening Map View
ast.target: 打开地图视图的默认模式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用 Ctrl+点击打开地图视图

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用中键点击打开地图视图

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto-add geolocation to an empty location proprty (mobile only)
ast.target: 自动将地理位置添加到空位置属性（仅限移动端）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Path patterns to never auto-fill location for
ast.target: 永不自动填充位置的路径模式

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 包含 1-2 个捕获组的正则表达式

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Quick map embed: search for an address, landmark or business name to center the map on.
ast.target: 快速地图嵌入：搜索地址、地标或商家名称以将地图居中。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Clicking 'Save' will overwrite an existing preset.
ast.target: 点击“保存”将覆盖现有预设。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 从 KML 导入地理位置...

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Import a path and add to Edit Mode note (as inline)...
ast.target: 导入路径并添加到编辑模式笔记（作为内联）...

ast.name: setTitle
ast.source: Import a path as vault attachment...

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 移除所有计算出的路线

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 转换为地理位置（地理搜索）

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 复制地理位置为 front matter

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在文件资源管理器中显示

ast.name: warn
ast.source: latlngs are not flat! Only the first ring will be used
ast.target: latlngs 不是扁平的！仅使用第一个环

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Deprecated use of _flat, please use L.LineUtil.isFlat instead.
ast.target: 已弃用 _flat 的用法，请改用 L.LineUtil.isFlat。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Google Maps already loaded outside @googlemaps/js-api-loader.This may result in undesirable behavior as options and script parameters may not match.
ast.target: Google Maps 已在 @googlemaps/js-api-loader 外部加载。这可能会导致不良行为，因为选项和脚本参数可能不匹配。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source: %c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value\n%cThe \`value\` property of a \`<select multiple>\` element should be an array, but it received a non-array value. The selection will be kept as is.\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value
ast.target: %c[svelte] select_multiple_invalid_value\\n%c`<select multiple>` 元素的 `value` 属性应为数组，但收到了非数组值。选择将保持原样。\\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/select_multiple_invalid_value

ast.name: warn
ast.source: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是组件\\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%cA \`<svelte:boundary>\` \`reset\` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在第一次调用时重置边界\\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Tried to use the 'fill' option without the 'Filler' plugin enabled. Please import and register the 'Filler' plugin and make sure it is not disabled in the options
ast.target: 尝试在未启用 'Filler' 插件的情况下使用 'fill' 选项。请导入并注册 'Filler' 插件，并确保它在选项中未被禁用

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: IMPORTANT! Map View now uses the new "Google Places (New)" API, which requires that you update your API key. See the "Migrating to Google Places API (New)" section of the README. Your geo searches might fail until you do this update!
ast.target: 重要！地图视图现在使用新的“Google Places (New)” API，这要求您更新 API 密钥。请参阅 README 中的“迁移到 Google Places API (New)”部分。在您完成此更新之前，您的地理搜索可能会失败！
